package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
)

// scenario for string_format_in_structured_logger: `logger.Info(fmt.Sprintf("user %s logged in", user))` instead of structured fields
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario430Positive(values []string) {
	for _, value := range values {
		log.Print(fmt.Sprintf("value=%s", value))
	}
}
